title: Step 1: Create a New Geometric Object
description:
Step 1: Create a New Geometric Object

Step 1: Create a New Geometric object

	Click the [All Tools] -
	 the   [Geometric]
	 button on the Vision Guide toolbar.

You will see a Geometric
	 icon appear above the [Geometric] button.

Click the Geometric icon
	 and drag to the image display of the Vision Guide window.

A name for the object
	 is automatically created.  In the example, it is called "Geom01"
	 because this is the first Geometric object created for this sequence.
	 (We will explain how to change the name later.)
